movie.title: Paru Parvathy (2025) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Kannada] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Paru Parvathy is a Kannada road movie about a solo traveler named Payal. The film explores themes of self-discovery, relationships, and emotions. It was shot in multiple locations, including Bengaluru, Goa, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, and Uttarakhand.
